welcome.title: Welcome to theopenlab
welcome.body: Turn how your team works into living playbooks — diagrams, tables and docs that stay in sync. Want a hand getting started?
welcome.buildWithAI: Build my first playbook with AI

checklist.title: Getting started
checklist.toast: You're all set up. Next: embed a live flow inside a document.

create.title: Create your first playbook
create.desc: Capture a process as a flow, a table, or a document.

surfaces.title: See the three views
surfaces.desc: One playbook is a Canvas, a Table and a Document — switch anytime.

askAi.title: Try Ask AI
askAi.desc: Describe a process and let AI draft the whole thing for you.

embed.title: Embed something live
embed.desc: Drop a live flow or table into a document — it stays in sync automatically.

share.title: Share your work
share.desc: Invite a teammate or grab a shareable link.

cmdk.title: Jump anywhere with ⌘K
cmdk.desc: Search every playbook, table and document instantly.

createNew.title: Start here
createNew.body: Click New to create your first playbook, table or document.

tiles.title: Pick a starting point
tiles.body: Each tile creates a different artifact — or let ‘Generate with AI’ draft one for you.

surfaces.title: One playbook, three views
surfaces.body: Switch between Canvas, Table and Document — it’s the same content, shown differently.

askAi.title: Your AI co-author
askAi.body: Ask AI to build or edit playbooks from a plain-language description.

slash.title: Rich blocks & links
slash.body: Type / for blocks and @ to link to another playbook.

canvasToolbar.title: Map your process
canvasToolbar.body: Add shapes from the toolbar and connect them to build a flow.

cmdk.title: Search everything
cmdk.body: Press ⌘K to jump to any playbook, table or document.

references.title: Backlinks
references.body: See what links here — and what this links to.
